dct_title_s: New York City COVID-19 Case and Death Totals by MODZCTA, 2020-2025
dct_description_sm: New York City COVID-19 Case and Death Totals by MODZCTA, 2020-2025 is a polygon theme representing COVID-19 Case and death statistics by zip code tabulation areas in New York City from February 29th of 2020 to October 25th of 2025. Attribute information includes confirmed and probable case counts, death totals as well s calculated death and case rates for the period. Columbia library staff accessed this data in May of 2026 from the NYC Health Github repo at https://github.com/nychealth/coronavirus-data/tree/master/totals and joined the data with the MODZCTA geographies available at the same repo. The file is provided it in the geopackage format in State Plane Long Island Coordinates.
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
